Vaporwave

Other names

Vapor

Decade of origin

Early 2010s

Key motifs

Hellenic statues, palm trees, obsolete technology

Key colours

Pastel pink and cyan, purple, neon gradients

Key values

Nostalgia, irony, technological melancholy

Primary platform

Tumblr, SoundCloud

Vaporwave is a microgenre of electronic music and an internet aesthetic that emerged in the early 2010s. It is defined by a fascination with retro cultural aesthetics from the 1980s and early 1990s.

Visual Characteristics

The aesthetic typically features pastel colors, marble textures, and Roman busts alongside tropical imagery.

Color Palette

Related Aesthetics

  • Synthwave
  • Lo-fi
  • Y2K Aesthetic
Internet Aesthetics
Synthwave
Music Internet Culture
